title: Satyameva Jayate
subTitle: DCP Shivansh is given a case to arrest the man responsible for the deaths of corrupt police officers. He begins his search without realising the killer is none other than Vir, his younger brother.

title: The Real Tiger
subTitle: An undercover cop, who is also the son of an MLA, strives to apprehend a dangerous don who is involved in illicit activities.

title: Daring Baaz
subTitle: Goutham resolves to reunite his grandfather with Sunanda, his estranged aunt. However, he chooses to pose as a driver to befriend her.

title: Dhartiputra
subTitle: Yashpal tries to rape Jeeva and her husband, Shiva, stops him while she manages to escape. However, Yashpal kills him and she vows to avenge his death.

title: Vijay The Master
subTitle: Troubled alcoholic teacher JD goes to work at a juvenile reform school. When he realises a dangerous criminal is using students to cover up his crimes, JD sets out to stop him.

title: A Flying Jatt
subTitle: Donning a mighty cape and a heart of gold, a quirky Punjabi superhero whooshes through low-altitude escapades and fights the humongous villain who threatens the world.

title: Saamy 2
subTitle: Ramasamy, who works as a front-end receptionist for Union Minister Viswanathan, decides to pursue civil service. Soon, Viswanathan's daughter falls in love with him after he saves her from gangsters.

title: Surya The Soldier
subTitle: When a soldier lands in trouble due to his anger issues, he begins seeing a psychologist in hopes of one day returning to duty.

title: Gadar 2
subTitle: Upon learning about his father's disappearance at the border, Jeete believes that his father is captured and sets out to rescue him in Pakistan.

title: Tehran
subTitle: An officer tries to expose the truth about an explosive detonation within Delhi in 2012. However, his country abandons him during his quest and he falls in the crosshairs of Iran.

title: Tehran
subTitle: An officer tries to expose the truth about an explosive detonation within Delhi in 2012. However, his country abandons him during his quest and he falls in the crosshairs of Iran.

title: The Road
subTitle: A father must protect his son from a group of cannibals who have menaced the streets. Soon, they plan to head south, where there is a hospitable environment to live in.

title: Pathu Thala
subTitle: An undercover police officer takes on a mission to take down a crime lord but soon finds himself in a difficult situation when he learns that the crime lord's business intentions are good.

title: Khel A Team to Play
subTitle: Two rival brothers face off against each other as coaches from opposite teams to win the annual village football tournament.

title: IPC 376
subTitle: A police officer looks into an informer who can predict future murders in a mysterious way. Soon, she unearths a sinister murder mystery that leads to a shocking truth.

title: Rogue
subTitle: After his lover betrays him, a heartbroken man swears off women forever, but fate intervenes when he has to save a woman from a chasing of gangster.

title: Dunki
subTitle: Four friends from a small village in Punjab set out on a dangerous journey to reach England without the necessary permits and documents.

title: Dhamaal
subTitle: Four lazy friends learn about a hidden treasure in Goa and set out to find it. However, a police inspector learns about their plan and begins to pursue them.

title: Hero The Bullet
subTitle: Shiva, a young man, is looked down upon by his father due to his irresponsible behaviour. He soon gets embroiled in a tussle with an egoistic gangster who threatens his family.

title: Ek Deewane Ki Deewaniyat
subTitle: An influential politician and a headstrong megastar's fiery romance fuelled with passion brings absolute chaos, mania and melancholy.

title: Dabangg
subTitle: Chulbul Pandey, a police officer, battles a corrupt political leader, Cheddi Singh, who strains Chulbul's relationship with his step-brother.

title: Dabangg
subTitle: Chulbul Pandey, a police officer, battles a corrupt political leader, Cheddi Singh, who strains Chulbul's relationship with his step-brother.

title: Akshara
subTitle: A girl from a poor family joins a reputed college but falls into the trap of the college chairman and is sent to jail.

title: Bagheera
subTitle: A psycho killer creates an application to kill women who get a complaint about cheating on their man. However, his life changes when he meets a psychology student.

title: Movie
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Main Khiladi Tu Anari
subTitle: A Bombay police officer seeks revenge when a drug dealer kills his brother. However, things get complicated when a film star begins to tag along, so that he can research a film role.

title: Holiday: A Soldier Is Never off Duty
subTitle: An army intelligence officer arrives in Mumbai to spend the holiday with his family. However, he must switch back to work mode after a bomb rips through the heart of the city.

title: Game Changer
subTitle: In the midst of a power struggle for the chief minister's post, an upstanding IPS officer enters the fray of politics to fight against its corrupt system.

title: Himmatwar
subTitle: The son of a wealthy man leaves his family post a misunderstanding. Later, when he saves a police officer from an evil man, this results in him earning the latter's wrath.

title: Zee Cine Awards 2026
subTitle: Zee Cine Awards 2026

title: Raid 2
subTitle: An honest Income Tax officer, Amay Patnaik, confronts the corrupt nexus in Bhoj. Beneath the veneer of honesty lies a sinister operation tied to Dada Bhai, a revered politician.

title: Deva
subTitle: A police officer investigates the murder of his close friend. However, he suffers a traumatic accident that wipes away his memory, jeopardising the investigation.
